gh_459e1e7f417453bb6ae517e5.title: Fully Remote! Full Stack Engineer (Go / Angular) at Jobsity
gh_459e1e7f417453bb6ae517e5.description:
## About [Jobsity](https://www.jobsity.com/)рҹ’Ў
Jobsity is a New YorkвҖ“based staffing company with 10+ years of experience, working with clients across the US, Canada, and Europe. We connect top-tier LATAM talentвҖ”only the top 3%вҖ”with long-term international opportunities and have successfully placed over 400 professionals across 15+ countries. As part of our recruitment process, we focus on finding the right role based on what matters most to you.

## Requirements
WeвҖҷre seeking a **Full Stack Engineer (Go / Angular)** to help build and scale modern web applications in a collaborative, product-focused environment. This role combines backend service development in Go with frontend engineering in Angular, requiring the ability to contribute across multiple layers of the application stack.

рқ—ӘМірқ—өМірқ—®МірқҳҒМі Мірқ—ұМірқ—јМі МірқҳҶМірқ—јМірқҳӮМі Мірқ—»Мірқ—ІМірқ—ІМірқ—ұМі МірқҳҒМірқ—јМі Мірқ—®Мірқ—ҪМірқ—ҪМірқ—№МірқҳҶМі МірқҳҖМірқҳӮМірқ—°Мірқ—°Мірқ—ІМірқҳҖМірқҳҖМірқ—іМірқҳӮМірқ—№Мірқ—№МірқҳҶМі?рҹҘҮ
рҹҢҹ Conversational English level (+B2 level)
рҹҢҹ Must reside in LATAMрҹҢҺ
рҹҢҹ Strong backend development experience with Go (Golang), including REST API and service design
рҹҢҹ Solid frontend engineering experience with Angular and modern web application development
рҹҢҹ Experience working across the full application stack with an understanding of scalable architectures and AI-assisted development workflows

## Modality
рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’» Fully remote

рҹ”№Yearly paid vacation.
рҹ”№Paid local holidays.
рҹ”№Learning budget.

## Type of contractрҹ“ң

This role is full-time!рҹ•ҳ
...working remotelyрҹҸЎ, with USD paymentрҹ’°, long-term relationshipрҹӨқ, within an international teamрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’» рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’», and working on international client projects!рҹҢҺ

## How to applyрҹӨ”
Send an email to [angela.barboza@jobsity.com](mailto:angela.barboza@jobsity.com) with your CV/LinkedIn attached, and please send it in the subject: "***Full Stack Engineer (Go / Angular)** - рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝрҹ“§"

## How to refer a friendрҹӨ”
Refer a friendрҹ‘Ҙ sending an email with your friend's CV/LinkedIn attached with the subject: **"**Referral for** *Full Stack Engineer (Go / Angular)**- рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝрҹ“§"
Or you can use this linkрҹ‘ү https://careers.jobsity.com/referral-program

## Any questions or additional details needed?
Feel free to send me a message on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/angela-barboza/)рҹ’¬
